title: RocketPoolRewardsInterval
description: A single rewards-distribution interval on the Rocket Pool network. Each interval produces a Merkle tree of node-operator and oracle DAO rewards (RPL plus ETH from the smoothing pool).

nodeRpl.description: RPL allocated to node operators in wei

odaoRpl.description: RPL allocated to oracle DAO members

pdaoRpl.description: RPL allocated to the protocol DAO treasury

smoothingPoolEth.description: ETH distributed from the smoothing pool in wei
